page: Microsoft Azure D32nds_v6 is a general-purpose, network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dndv6 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs and operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes 1890 GB of local storage capacity and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. As a network-optimized instance, it is designed to handle workloads requiring higher network throughput. The instance does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D32nds_v6 offers a balanced resource density of compute, memory, and local storage, making it suitable for enterprise-grade general-purpose workloads. The combination of 32 dedicated vCPUs, a 1:4 RAM-to-vCPU ratio, and substantial local storage makes this instance appropriate for relational databases, web serving, application servers, and moderate data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D32nds_v6 is a network-optimized, general-purpose virtual machine within the Dndv6 family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage, it includes 1890 GB of local disk space and supports premium storage configurations. Lacking integrated GPUs, this instance is designed for workloads that prioritize balanced compute and memory resources alongside high network throughput. The combination of dedicated processing power and substantial local storage capacity makes the D32nds_v6 highly suitable for database hosting, application servers, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
